## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] The spec follows the existing template structure (purpose, required files, per-section rules, checklist)
- [ ] Template files are canonical (not repo-specific adaptations)
- [ ] README.md updated if a new spec directory was added
- [ ] Cross-references to other specs are correct
- [ ] Changes are scoped — no unrelated files in this PR
